channel.title: Workflow-Automation on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Workflow-Automation on Junho Lee

item.title: Designing Context to Make AI Your Co-worker
item.description: How to build a sustainable AI workflow by turning context into infrastructure and encoding your engineering preferences into configurations.

item.title: Building Cross-Validation Systems with Claude Code and Codex
item.description: A dual-agent strategy separating author and reviewer roles to eliminate code blind spots and improve developer productivity.

item.title: Prompt Master: Engineering Waste-Free Claude Workflows
item.description: Reduce AI retries and token waste using a structured framework that optimizes prompts across nine technical dimensions and specific model architectures.

item.title: Directory Design and SOPs That Make or Break AI Agent Organizations
item.description: When you first deploy AI agents, outputs land in random folders and formats vary every time. Aligning folder structure to the org chart and codifying SOPs is what makes quality consistent.
